subject: Voltorb — spherical red-and-white creature with angry eyes, surrounded by electrical energy in a dark stormy setting
description: A perfectly spherical creature dominates the frame — its upper half is red, lower half white, with a horizontal seam line and a pair of angry-looking eyes on its face. Yellow-white electrical bolts arc around it against a dark stormy background. The setting feels charged and tense, with the creature's expression conveying irritability or menace. The palette contrasts the creature's stark red-and-white geometry against a dark yellow-brown storm background.
foreground: red-and-white spherical creature with angry eyes
background: dark stormy background with electrical bolts
